description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a detached double garage, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and several mature trees. The house features a large covered front porch with railings, a driveway leading to the garage, and a backyard with a swimming pool and a swing set. The exterior walls are light-colored, complemented by a dark, gable-style roof. Multiple windows of varying sizes are distributed across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard includes a wooden deck area with outdoor furniture, and the property is bordered by greenery, enhancing its residential appeal.
description: A two-story suburban house with a detached garage, covered porch, backyard pool, and mature trees on a grassy lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, and detached garage with trees lining the property.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard pool, wooden deck, swing set, and two parked cars near the garage.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backyard amenities, including the pool, swing set, and the back of the garage.
description_view_3: Side view showing the driveway, garage, and a row of trees along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of standard and large windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered porch with railings, steps, and a single front door, accented by an overhanging roof.
